Product Id: In the financial account, a plus sign denotes an increase in investment and a minus sign denotes a decrease in investment.
Canadian direct investment abroad (CDIA) excludes deposits (claims net of liabilities) of Canadian banks with their foreign affiliates and branches abroad.
Foreign direct investment in Canada (FDIC) excludes deposits (liabilities net of claims) of Canadian subsidiaries and branches of foreign banks with their head offices and related companies abroad.
Net acquisitions or sales of new interest.
